calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
R. Jason Honey, Esq. for and with appellant/defendant Gloria Elizabeth Amaya
Randall R. Paul, respondent/plaintiff appearing in propria persona.

This cause is regularly called for trial de novo. Defendant waives the need for a Court Certified Interpreter. All parties are affirmed. Mr. Honey presents a brief to plaintiff and the Court.

Randall R. Paul testifies on his own behalf. The following exhibit is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - group of photos from accident scene

Mr. Honey addresses the Court. Gloria Elizabeth Amaya testifies.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Judgment Entered
